Game Setup

Configure your quiz session

Game Rules

  • Teams get an amount of starting coins (default: 500)
  • The order for answering will be randomized for each question
  • See the question and bid as many coins as you want
  • Highest bidder gets to answer first
  • If wrong, their whole bid amount is deducted
  • If correct, only half of their bid amount is deducted
  • Question passes to next highest bidders
  • Only the highest bidder gets their coins deducted
  • Non-bidders can win 10% of their starting coins if correct
